Monte Carlo simulation framework for evaluating missing-data imputation robustness
in published economics papers. 3 mechanisms (MCAR, MAR, NMAR) × 7 severity levels
(1–50%) × 7 imputation methods × 30 iterations per paper. Baseline regressions are
replicated from published tables; coefficient stability under artificial missingness
is tracked across the full factorial grid and reported in structured Excel workbooks.
